# PERF-148 negative: a buffered channel with a guaranteed receiver
lang: go
file: PERF-148-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "context"

func Spawn(ctx context.Context, work []int) {
	ch := make(chan int, len(work))
	go func() {
		for {
			select {
			case <-ch:
			case <-ctx.Done():
				return
			}
		}
	}()
	for _, item := range work {
		ch <- item
	}
}
